text_lines.text: HKEX has only one class of shares, where all the shares (100%)
rank equally in all respects, including in relation to dividends,
HKEX shares are listed on the Stock Exchange and
are eligible for Southbound Trading under Stock
Connect. HKEX is currently a constituent stock of the
HSI and a number of sustainability indices as
disclosed on the HKEX Group website IR .
